text.title: Writing Specifications Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Writing Specifications end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: load-context
step.action: Read constitution.md and last 3 completed feature specs.

step.name: personas-and-stories
step.action: Author ≥2 personas + a user story map (backbone + walking skeleton).

step.name: requirements
step.action: Author FR-X (functional) and NFR-X (non-functional) rows, each linked to a US-X.

step.name: acceptance-criteria
step.action: Write Given-When-Then for every FR; include negative paths.

step.name: scope
step.action: Author explicit In-scope and Out-of-scope lists.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run scripts/validate-writing-specifications.py to confirm schema + ID conventions.
